title: Project Management Business Partner (all gender)

company_info.size_raw: large company (noted by orchestrator; no explicit employee count in JD text)

required_skills: Zeit-, Kosten-, Ressourcen- und Qualitätsdaten integration
matched_skills: Project management experience (PMO @ HSBC, Project Coordination @ Hapag-Lloyd)
KPI / project metrics analysis & reporting (Power BI dashboards, C-suite reporting)
Risk management & escalation (HSBC USD 8M programme risk management)
Stakeholder communication at all levels (Steering Committee, C-level, cross-functional)
Milestone monitoring & progress reporting (Hapag-Lloyd Agile delivery)
missing_skills: Formal engineering background (Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen or comparable — degree not confirmed)
Configuration control / contract-based change management (Konfigurationskontrolle mit Vertragsdaten)
Aerospace / automotive / defense sector PM experience
Willingness to travel within Germany monthly (Customer Services variant)
core_responsibilities: Integrate and analyze time, cost, resource, and quality data across projects
Plan programs/projects including scheduling (Zeitplanung) and work breakdown structure
Monitor deliverables, milestones, and phase-gate reviews
Implement PM processes and tools; report on progress, status, and results to stakeholders
cv_highlights: PMO @ HSBC: USD 8M digital transformation programme — risk management, KPI dashboards, Steering Committee reporting across 6 workstreams
Project Coordination @ Hapag-Lloyd: Agile/Scrum sprint planning, KPI tracking, milestone monitoring, stakeholder management
Power BI Certified — directly supports Projektkennzahlen analysis & data storytelling requirement
Fluent German — JD is entirely in German; full communication capability with German-speaking clients and stakeholders
Cross-functional coordination & C-level reporting experience maps to 'kommunizierst klar und sicher mit Stakeholdern auf allen Ebenen'
gaps: No confirmed engineering degree (Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen); may need to emphasise transferable analytical/technical skills
No explicit aerospace/automotive/defense sector experience — ALTEN's core client base
Contract-based configuration control is a specialised competency not evidenced in CV
Customer Services variant requires monthly travel within Germany — should confirm availability
recommended_emphasis: Highlight USD 8M programme governance and cost tracking as direct evidence of Zeit/Kosten/Qualität data integration
Lead with risk management and milestone tracking achievements from HSBC (quantified: 6 workstreams, steering committee)
Emphasise KPI framework design and Power BI reporting as Projektkennzahlen analysis capability
Showcase German language fluency prominently — JD is fully in German, client communication will be in German
For PM Office Operations variant: stress internal PMO process implementation and tool deployment
For Customer Services variant: stress cross-functional stakeholder management and adaptability across project types
Frame Hapag-Lloyd Agile delivery experience as evidence of PM process implementation and progress reporting
recommendation: Strong apply — match score 78. Boru's HSBC PMO and Hapag-Lloyd project coordination experience aligns well with all core requirements: risk management, KPI reporting, milestone tracking, and stakeholder communication at all levels. The engineering sector gap (ALTEN serves aerospace/automotive clients) is a moderate risk but not a blocker, as the JD focuses on PM competencies rather than domain expertise. The PM Office Operations variant is the stronger fit given Boru's internal PMO background. Tailor CV to emphasise programme governance, cost tracking, and German communication capability.
